Class IceCreamMachine

java.lang.Object
logic.counters.BaseCounter
logic.counters.IceCreamMachine
All Implemented Interfaces:
Updatable
public class IceCreamMachine extends BaseCounter implements Updatable
Counter for making ice cream.

      pX - the x coordinate
      pY - the y coordinate
      width - the width
      height - the height
      flavor - the ice cream flavor it produces
